disclaimer.headline: For Informational Use Only
disclaimer.body1: This tool provides general dosing estimates based on published guidelines. It is not a substitute for the advice, diagnosis, or treatment plan of your physician or qualified healthcare provider.
disclaimer.body2: Always consult your doctor or care team before making any changes to medication dosing.

validationMessages.invalidFatGrams: Enter a valid fat amount (e.g. 30 or 25.5)
validationMessages.zeroFatGrams: Enter a fat amount greater than zero
